fields.label: Accessed By
fields.description: Staff email — must be in TERMINAL_RECORDING_ACCESS_EMAILS at the time of access, checked server-side, never client-supplied.

fields.label: Reason
fields.description: Required justification, e.g. a linked support ticket number or incident description. Free browsing is not a supported use case — this log exists to make that visible, not to enable it.

fields.label: Granted
fields.description: 0 = the access attempt was logged but REFUSED (e.g. requester not on the access list, or the session was already purged). Denials are logged too — a pattern of denied attempts is itself a signal.
